title: Event
description: CloudEvents 1.0 compatible event envelope. Used for Outbox Pattern propagation (PostgreSQL → Neo4j/Redis) and PROV-O lineage (patent CP5). Source: ontology/07-operational-ontology-design.md.

source.description: CloudEvents 'source' — the context in which the event happened (e.g. '/rapai/agents/AG-INT').

subject.description: Optional subject — often the primary Object ID (project_id, task_id, etc.).

dataschema.description: URI of the JSON Schema governing 'data'.

prov_id.description: PROV-O Activity URI for lineage (patent CP5).

model_id.description: LLM/ML model identifier used to produce the event (if applicable). Required when data originates from an LLM call for PROV-O lineage.

confidence.description: Model confidence (0–1). Used for L3 Hallucination defense threshold routing.
